cards.title: DePtH OS
cards.copy: Custom Redox OS distro — the native operating substrate for ACRORHAGI hardware. Kernel and artifacts never leave bonded devices.

cards.title: ACRORHAGI
cards.copy: Bio-inspired compute — the hardware layer. Platform serves as the integrations manager and access point for ACRORHAGI systems.

cards.title: ACONTIA
cards.copy: Secure mesh connecting DePtH OS nodes — adaptive routing with zero-trust processes. Enables Platform utility access.

context: The Platform is the access point for ACRORHAGI hardware running DePtH OS, connected via ACONTIA mesh. It exposes an integrations manager for utility that ties into Labs research infrastructure and the ANE/ZYFT economic layers.
